meta.ranking: Strictly by priorityScore = round(impact^2 * confidence / effort *10)/10 (deterministic). impact/effort 1-5, confidence 0.5-1.0. Ties: higher impact, then lower effort, then title.
meta.caveat: impact/effort/confidence are deterministic estimates from discovered evidence, NOT measured outcomes (Gate 0 blind). Re-score once GA4/GSC read access opens.
